% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

2. ! [X0] : (platypus(X0) => ~has_teeth(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (platypus(X0) => mammal(X0)) [input(axiom)]

9. ! [X0] : (~has_teeth(X0) | ~platypus(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
10. ! [X0] : (mammal(X0) | ~platypus(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
11. ? [X0] : ((~mammal(X0) | has_teeth(X0)) & platypus(X0)) [ennf transformation 7]
16. ? [X0] : ((~mammal(X0) | has_teeth(X0)) & platypus(X0)) => ((~mammal(sK2) | has_teeth(sK2)) & platypus(sK2)) [skolem symbol introduction]
17. (~mammal(sK2) | has_teeth(sK2)) & platypus(sK2) [skolemisation 11,16]
20. ~platypus(X0) | ~has_teeth(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
21. ~platypus(X0) | mammal(X0) [cnf transformation 10]
23. platypus(sK2) [cnf transformation 17]
24. ~mammal(sK2) | has_teeth(sK2) [cnf transformation 17]
26. 1 <=> has_teeth(sK2) [avatar definition]
30. 2 <=> mammal(sK2) [avatar definition]
32. ~mammal(sK2) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 30]
33. 1 | ~2 [avatar split clause 24,30,26]
34. ~has_teeth(sK2) [resolution 20,23]
36. ~1 [avatar split clause 34,26]
37. mammal(sK2) [resolution 21,23]
39. $false <- (~2) [forward subsumption resolution 37,32]
40. 2 [avatar contradiction clause 39]
s1. ~2 | 1 [sat_conversion 33]
s2. ~1 [sat_conversion 36]

s4. # [rat s1,s2,s3]
41. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
